canvas.background: plain warm light-gray for character sheets

global.styleAnchor: original limited-2D Berlin social-comedy design, thick black outlines, simplified repeatable shapes, expressive eyebrows and posture, dirty neutral palette with restrained neon accents, clean readable silhouette, production sheet presentation

characters.name: Ricco

referenceCandidate.sourceLocator: GitHub Issue #155 attachment; attachment URL intentionally omitted from repository contracts

characters.identityAnchor: 24-year-old rural newcomer to Berlin and aspiring DJ, slim young adult with an open slightly tired face, large honest eyes, dark slightly messy hair and a nervous half-smile
characters.wardrobeAnchor: plain hoodie or washed track jacket, practical trousers, too-new light sneakers
characters.propAnchor: black headphones around neck, oversized backpack, blue Tupperware lid
characters.silhouetteAnchor: slim body leaning slightly away from chaos, oversized backpack and headphones remain readable in black silhouette
characters.providerNeutralPromptTemplate: {{STYLE_ANCHOR}}. Character production sheet for Ricco, {{IDENTITY_ANCHOR}}. {{WARDROBE_ANCHOR}}. {{PROP_ANCHOR}}. {{SILHOUETTE_ANCHOR}}. Show {{REQUIRED_VIEWS}} and a clearly separated expression row with {{REQUIRED_EXPRESSIONS}}. Stable face, hair, proportions, clothing and props in every view. Plain warm light-gray sheet background, no text, no labels, no speech bubbles, no logos.
acceptanceChecks: reads unmistakably as an adult aged about 24
same face and hair across all views
headphones, backpack and blue lid stay consistent
silhouette is distinct from Basti and Jule
at least four expressions are clearly different
forms are simple enough for limited 2D animation
no forbidden child, hero, anime or 3D signals

characters.name: Basti Prenzl
characters.identityAnchor: 44-year-old soft antagonist, former house squatter turned illegal landlord, calm educated face, round glasses, thinning slightly gray hair tied into a small bun or tied-back remnant, short groomed beard, soft moral permanent smile
characters.wardrobeAnchor: expensive eco outdoor jacket over understated clothes, clean and more orderly than the house
characters.propAnchor: tote bag, reusable cup, unusually large key ring
characters.silhouetteAnchor: upright relaxed posture, one explanatory hand and one hand holding cup or keys
characters.providerNeutralPromptTemplate: {{STYLE_ANCHOR}}. Character production sheet for Basti Prenzl, {{IDENTITY_ANCHOR}}. {{WARDROBE_ANCHOR}}. {{PROP_ANCHOR}}. {{SILHOUETTE_ANCHOR}}. Show {{REQUIRED_VIEWS}} and expression row {{REQUIRED_EXPRESSIONS}}. He must look friendly and self-satisfied rather than openly threatening. Stable face, glasses, tied hair, beard, jacket, cup and keys across every view. Plain warm light-gray background, no text, no logos.
acceptanceChecks: age around mid-forties is readable
round glasses and tied thinning hair stay stable
reusable cup and large key ring are readable
friendliness hides the power dynamic
silhouette differs clearly from Ricco
no villain, CEO or punk cliché

characters.name: Jule
characters.identityAnchor: 29-year-old house activist and informal plenary power center, intelligent sharp critical eyes, messy bob or short fringe, optional single colored strand, nose ring, controlled morally superior expression
characters.wardrobeAnchor: oversized sweater, old worker trousers, heavy boots, a few buttons or patches
characters.propAnchor: marker or roll of tape used as an everyday authority prop
characters.silhouetteAnchor: broad oversized upper-body shape, firm two-foot stance, crossed arms or clear marker hand
characters.providerNeutralPromptTemplate: {{STYLE_ANCHOR}}. Character production sheet for Jule, {{IDENTITY_ANCHOR}}. {{WARDROBE_ANCHOR}}. {{PROP_ANCHOR}}. {{SILHOUETTE_ANCHOR}}. Show {{REQUIRED_VIEWS}} and expression row {{REQUIRED_EXPRESSIONS}}. Stable haircut, nose ring, oversized clothes, boots and marker or tape. She looks controlled and formidable without glamour or sexualization. Plain warm light-gray background, no text, no logos.
acceptanceChecks: critical gaze works without dialogue
marker or tape reads as authority prop
outfit remains identical across views
silhouette differs from Ricco and Basti
no glamour, sexualization or anime cues
stance communicates control

characters.name: Don Miau
characters.identityAnchor: old heavy territorial house cat with a broad head, thick body, scruffy dark-gray fur, half-closed yellow eyes and one visibly damaged ear or small scar
characters.propAnchor: one paw resting on an important household object or elevated surface
characters.silhouetteAnchor: broad low immovable seated cat silhouette, anatomically fully feline, positioned like a small neighborhood judge
characters.providerNeutralPromptTemplate: {{STYLE_ANCHOR}}. Animal character production sheet for Don Miau, {{IDENTITY_ANCHOR}}. {{SILHOUETTE_ANCHOR}}. Show {{REQUIRED_VIEWS}} and expression row {{REQUIRED_EXPRESSIONS}}. Keep realistic cat anatomy simplified into repeatable 2D forms. Stable fur pattern, yellow eyes and damaged ear or scar in every view. No clothing, no human posture, no speaking mouth. Plain warm light-gray background, no text, no logos.
acceptanceChecks: anatomy remains fully feline
damaged ear or scar is stable
half-closed yellow eyes stay consistent
authority reads without horror styling
silhouette is broad and low
no human speech or humanoid expression

decisionRule: The recovered Ricco image is bound only as a source-evidenced reference candidate. It remains non-master until a separate human decision explicitly grants APPROVED_MASTER. No template in this file grants generation or master approval.
